description: default value: Scans Maven artifacts for class files with the same fully qualified name but different bytecode
Purpose: Detect class conflicts before they cause runtime issues

inputDir: Directory to scan for artifact files
Scanned recursively for files matching include patterns
outputDir: Directory for detailed reports (count, diff, browse)

include: Include only artifacts matching these regex patterns
Default: .*\.jar and .*\.zip to match all JAR and ZIP files
exclude: Exclude artifacts matching these regex patterns
